title: nie-bot: BotError typed error enum
description:
What: Define BotError enum in bot/src/error.rs covering all bot failure modes.

Algorithm:
1. Create bot/src/error.rs with:
   - #[derive(Debug, thiserror::Error)] pub enum BotError
   - Variants: Config(String), Keyfile(String), RelayConnect(String), StdinClosed, ScriptTimeout { path, secs }, ScriptFailed { exit_code: i32 }, Serialization(#[from] serde_json::Error)
2. Add pub mod error; + pub use error::BotError; to bot/src/lib.rs (or main.rs if no lib)
3. Add thiserror to bot/Cargo.toml deps

Defensive: Every variant has a descriptive message. No variant swallows context.

Agent team: I (implementer). V (validator) runs cargo build -p nie-bot.
Tests: BotError variants all implement Display correctly (doc test or unit test)
acceptance_criteria: cargo build -p nie-bot clean; all BotError variants have Display impl via thiserror
